tasks.label: Test Runner
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 2; node run_tests2.js; kill $SERVER_PID

tasks.label: Test Runner 2
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 2; node run_tests2.js; kill $SERVER_PID

tasks.label: Test Output
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 2; node run_tests2.js > test_output.txt; kill $SERVER_PID

tasks.label: Run Tests Correctly
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 1; node run_tests2.js > test_output.txt; kill $SERVER_PID

tasks.label: Run Tests With Error output
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 1; node run_tests2.js > test_output.txt; kill $SERVER_PID

tasks.label: Run Tests With Fix
tasks.command: node index.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 1; node run_tests2.js > test_output.txt; kill $SERVER_PID
